zh.lifeSummary: 當John De Woodforde Ward Of The Black Prince於1358年11月11日出生在英國萊希斯特斯爾伯頓 拉札斯時，他的父親William de Woodford Sergeant-at-Law28歲，母親Janetta Brabazon29歲。他於1375年之前與Mabelle De Folville在英國結婚。他們至少是2個兒子和1個女兒的父母。他去世於1401年在英國萊希斯特斯爾梅爾敦 莫布雷享年43歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当John De Woodforde Ward Of The Black Prince于1358年11月11日出生在英国萊希斯特斯爾伯頓 拉札斯时，他的父亲William de Woodford Sergeant-at-Law28岁，母亲Janetta Brabazon29岁。他于1375年之前与Mabelle De Folville在英国结婚。他们至少是2个儿子和1个女儿的父母。他去世于1401年在英国萊希斯特斯爾梅爾敦 莫布雷享年43岁。

nameMeanings.name: De
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Woodforde
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of Family Names in Britain and Ireland © University of the West of England 2016

variants.name: Woodford
meanings: English and Scottish: habitational name from any of various places called with Old English wudu ‘wood’ + ford ‘ford’, such as Woodford in Cheshire, Cornwall, Essex, Northamptonshire, and Wiltshire. In Scotland, the name is derived from Woodford in Saint Boswells (Roxburghshire).
History: Thomas Woodford emigrated from Lincolnshire, England, to NY in 1690.

nameMeanings.name: John
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: form of   John  , also used quite frequently in the English-speaking world. In Northern Ireland it is sometimes found as a variant of   Ewan .

historicEvents.title: Wycliffe's Bible
historicEvents.description: John Wycliffe, English theologian and professor at the University of Oxford, completed a translation of the Bible from the Latin Vulgate into Middle English. This translation is known as Wycliffe's Bible and was completed around 1382.

en.lifeSummary: When John De Woodforde Ward Of The Black Prince was born on 11 November 1358, in Burton Lazars, Leicestershire, England, his father, William de Woodford Sergeant-at-Law, was 28 and his mother, Janetta Brabazon, was 29. He married Mabelle De Folville before 1375, in England. They were the parents of at least 2 sons and 1 daughter. He died in 1401, in Melton Mowbray, Leicestershire, England, at the age of 43.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque John De Woodforde Ward Of The Black Prince est né le 11 novembre 1358, à Burton Lazars, Leicestershire, Angleterre, son père, William de Woodford Sergeant-at-Law, avait 28 ans et sa mère, Janetta Brabazon, avait 29 ans. Il a épousé Mabelle De Folville avant 1375, à Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 2 fils et 1 fille. Il est décédé en 1401, à Melton Mowbray, Leicestershire, Angleterre, à l’âge de 43 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als John De Woodforde Ward Of The Black Prince am 11. November 1358 in Burton Lazars, Leicestershire, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater William de Woodford Sergeant-at-Law 28 und seine Mutter Janetta Brabazon 29. Er hat vor 1375 in England Mabelle De Folville geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 2 Söhne und 1 Tochter. Er starb 1401 im Alter von 43 Jahren in Melton Mowbray, Leicestershire, England.

it.lifeSummary: Quando John De Woodforde Ward Of The Black Prince è nato il il 11 novembre 1358 nel Burton Lazars, Leicestershire, England, il suo padre, William de Woodford Sergeant-at-Law, aveva 28 anni e il suo madre, Janetta Brabazon, aveva 29 anni. Lui sposato Mabelle De Folville prima del 1375, nel England. Erano genitori di almeno 2 figli e 1 figlia. Morì nel 1401, nel Melton Mowbray, Leicestershire, England, all'età di 43 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: John De Woodforde Ward Of The Black Princeが1358年11月11日にイギリスレアイセステルシュアイアブルトン ラザルズで生まれた時，父William de Woodford Sergeant-at-Lawは28歳，母Janetta Brabazonは29歳であった。1375年以前にイギリスでMabelle De Folvilleと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも2人の息子と1人の娘の親であった。彼は1401年にイギリスレアイセステルシュアイアメルトン モウブレイで43歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: John De Woodforde Ward Of The Black Prince(이)가 1358년 11월 11일 영국 레이스스터실르 버턴 라자르스에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 William de Woodford Sergeant-at-Law(은)는 28세였고, 그의 어머니 Janetta Brabazon(은)는 29세였다. 그는 1375년 이전 영국에서 Mabelle De Folville(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1401년 영국 레이스스터실르 멜턴 모우브라이에서 43세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando John De Woodforde Ward Of The Black Prince nasceu em 11 de novembro de 1358, em Burton Lazars, Leicestershire, Inglaterra, seu pai, William de Woodford Sergeant-at-Law, tinha 28 anos e sua mãe, Janetta Brabazon, tinha 29 anos. Ele casou-se com Mabelle De Folville antes 1375, em Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 2 filhos e 1 filha. Ele faleceu em 1401, em Melton Mowbray, Leicestershire, Inglaterra, com 43 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда John De Woodforde Ward Of The Black Prince родился 11 ноября 1358 г. в местности буртон лазарс, лисестиршир, Англия, его отцу по имени William de Woodford Sergeant-at-Law было 28 лет, а матери, которую звали Janetta Brabazon, 29. Он женился на женщине по имени Mabelle De Folville перед 1375 г. в местности Англия. У них было по крайней мере 2 сына и 1 дочь. Он умер в 1401 г. в местности мелтон мавбрэи, лисестиршир, Англия в возрасте 43 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando John De Woodforde Ward Of The Black Prince nació el 11 de noviembre de 1358, en Burton Lazars, Leicestershire, Inglaterra, su papá, William de Woodford Sergeant-at-Law, tenía 28 años y su mamá, Janetta Brabazon, tenía 29 años. Se casó con Mabelle De Folville antes de 1375, en Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 2 hijos y 1 hija. Murió en 1401, en Melton Mowbray, Leicestershire, Inglaterra, a la edad de 43 años.
